items.title: Timothée Chalamet talks about the pressure to take certain roles
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Timothée Chalamet reflects on staying patient early in his career and not giving into the pressure to take certain roles.
#timotheechalamet #hollywood #shorts

items.title: Man charged with killing Russian general in Moscow bombing claimed by Ukraine
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
A citizen of Uzbekistan was charged and detained by a Russian court with killing a senior Russian general and his assistant following a bombing with an electric scooter which was later claimed by Ukraine's security services, Russian state news agency Tass said Thursday. Read more: https://bit.ly/3Bsz7kd 

#russia #ukraine #news #moscow

items.title: Suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing faces new federal murder charges
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: Luigi Mangione, the suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO, was taken back to New York by plane and helicopter Thursday to face federal charges of murder and stalking, escalating the case after his earlier state indictment. #shorts #LuigiMangione #BrianThompson #UnitedHealthcare #NewYork

items.title: LIVE: Verdict expected in Gisèle Pelicot rape trial in France
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Live outside a court in Avignon, France, as a panel of five judges is expected to deliver verdicts for 51 men charged with aggravated rape and sexual assault on Gisèle Pelicot in a historic case that has profoundly shaken the country over the past several months. Read more here: https://bit.ly/3DoWqfc

#france #trial #live

items.title: Jurnee Smollett reflects on challenges of growing up in Hollywood
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Jurnee Smollett opens up about facing sexual harassment as a child actor and highlights the need for stronger protections and safer environments in Hollywood and beyond.
#jurneesmollett #hollywood #shorts

items.title: Government shutdown: Hakeem Jeffries says Republicans should stick with bipartisan deal
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries said a deal is a deal, and any discussion of  President-elect Donald Trump’s new demands for a debt limit increase are “premature.” Read more: https://bit.ly/3P6DqVi 

#news #governmentshutdown #trump

#pentagon #live #news

items.title: LIVE: French President Emmanuel Macron visits cyclone-devastated Mayotte
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Macron arrived in the Indian Ocean archipelago of Mayotte to survey the devastation wreaked by Cyclone Chido. Read more here: https://bit.ly/4gjfn1F

#mayotte #macron #live

items.title: Gisèle Pelicot’s ex-husband sentenced to 20 years in prison in drugging-and-rape trial
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
All 51 men, including Dominique Pelicot, were found guilty on Thursday in the drugging-and-rape trial of Gisèle Pelicot. Here's what to know. 

#news #france #giselepelicot

items.title: LIVE: Outside court as UnitedHealthcare CEO killing suspect returns to New York
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Live outside a courthouse in New York as the suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO faces new federal charges of murder, stalking and weapons charges, according to a complaint unsealed Thursday. 

Luigi Mangione agreed to return to New York to face a state murder charge at a morning court appearance in Pennsylvania, where he was arrested last week after five days on the run.

#news #live #luigimangione

items.title: Putin boasts that his military operation in Ukraine has strengthened Russia
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
President Vladimir Putin boasted that his military operation in Ukraine has strengthened Russia, as he held his annual news conference and call-in show Thursday. He used the tightly choreographed event, which lasted over four hours, to reinforce his authority and demonstrate a sweeping command of everything from consumer prices to military hardware. Read more: https://bit.ly/3VPbdX3 

#putin #news #russia #ukraine 

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

items.title: Israel and Hamas appear close to ceasefire deal as Israel-Houthis tensions continue
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Israel and Hamas are closing in on an agreement to end more than 14 months of war. But so far, the sides remain unable to seal the deal. Read more: https://bit.ly/3ZJQTaA 

#gaza #news #israel #houthi

items.title: LIVE: House votes on plan to prevent a government shutdown
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
Watch live as the House votes on a plan to prevent a government shutdown.

President-elect Donald Trump announced “success” with a new plan to fund the government and lift the debt ceiling. He praised Speaker Mike Johnson and House Republicans for coming to a “very good deal,” urging Congress to swiftly pass it in votes as soon as Thursday evening.

#news #live #governmentshutdown

items.title: How gene edits allow pig organ transplants in people
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: Attempts at animal-to-human transplants failed for decades. Now scientists can edit pig genes, trying to bridge the species gap enough to keep the human immune system from immediately attacking the foreign tissue and allowing anti-rejection drugs to work. #shorts #pigorgans #kidneytransplant #organtransplant #science #genes

items.title: Government shutdown will cost troops their pay, Pentagon warns
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
The Pentagon warned Thursday that Republicans’ decision to abandon a congressional spending plan will cost troops their paychecks over the holidays unless some agreement is reached before Friday's deadline to prevent a government shutdown. Read more: https://bit.ly/3P6DqVi 

#news #governmentshutdown
